negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The audited v2.2 port lacks video Phase 2 settlement pricing that extracts width, height, and outputDurationMs and fails malformed delivery data rather than using a fallback.
related_but_insufficient_code: registry.rs contains video pricing fields but read_model_from_db zeroes them in this port slice.
constants.rs re-exports VIDEO_CALL_PRECOMPILE but has no video response width/height/duration offsets or fee constants.
payload and verifier metadata helpers explicitly reject VIDEO_CALL_PRECOMPILE as an unsupported two-phase fee family in the v2 delivery path.
ritual-revm-internal video_call.rs documents outputWidth/outputHeight/outputDurationMs but is precompile ABI documentation, not block builder/verifier settlement pricing.

notes: The registered video precompile is not supported by the v2 payload delivery and verification fee path.
rationale: The payload builder and block verifier add audio duration extraction from the delivery result, the fee crate adds audio duration tiers and calculate_audio_fees_phase2, and the verifier labels extraction failure consensus-critical with no fallback. The merge adds VIDEO_CALL_PRECOMPILE, video constants, video_escrow_lockup, calculate_video_fees_phase1/phase2, payload extraction of width/height/duration_ms, and verifier-side rejection on extraction failure. Collapsed 2 closely related historical candidate statements into the latest effective formulation.
statement: Video Phase 2 settlement pricing must extract outputWidth, outputHeight, and outputDurationMs from the delivery result and calculate the executor fee as base fee plus rounded-up duration seconds multiplied by the resolution tier rate; malformed or too-short video delivery data must fail pricing rather than use a fallback.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create audio Phase 2 delivery results with durations in each tier and assert payload settlement creation and block verification compute matching calculate_audio_fees_phase2 values; provide too-short delivery data and assert pricing/verification fails.

Create video Phase 2 delivery results for multiple resolutions and durations, assert payload settlement creation and block verification compute calculate_video_fees_phase2(width,height,duration_ms), and assert malformed delivery data rejects the block or settlement.
summary: Video Phase 2 resolution-duration pricing is absent from the audited port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create audio Phase 2 delivery results with durations in each tier and assert payload settlement creation and block verification compute matching calculate_audio_fees_phase2 values; provide too-short delivery data and assert pricing/verification fails.
title: Video Phase 2 pricing uses resolution and duration
